description: Name verification, cleaning, parsing, rank lookup, column standardization; LLM provider functions; report infrastructure

functions.name: clean_taxon_names
functions.description: Clean and standardize scientific names; length-preserving (invalid -> NA)

output.description: Cleaned names (same length as input; NA for invalid)

functions.name: verify_taxon_names
functions.description: Verify names against Global Names taxonomic backbones

output.description: Data frame with matched_name, classification_path, classification_ranks

functions.name: create_taxon_names
functions.description: Derive taxon_name + taxon_name_rank from taxonomy columns

output.description: Input with taxon_name and taxon_name_rank columns added

functions.name: rename_cols
functions.description: Rename columns from source-specific names to DwC standard

inputs.name: df
inputs.description: Data frame with non-standard column names

inputs.name: col_map
inputs.description: Named vector: c(old_name = 'new_name'). Names are EXISTING column names, values are DESIRED new names. Example: c('Latitude' = 'decimalLatitude')

output.description: Data frame with standardized column names

functions.name: call_anthropic_api
functions.description: LLM provider: send prompt to Anthropic Claude API and return text response

inputs.name: api_key
inputs.description: API key (default from ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var)

output.description: LLM response text with model attribute

functions.name: call_gemini_api
functions.description: LLM provider: send prompt to Google Gemini API
functions.scaling_note: Single API call; free tier available

functions.name: call_openai_api
functions.description: LLM provider: send prompt to OpenAI API
functions.scaling_note: Single API call; paid account required

functions.name: change_backbone
functions.description: Translate taxonomy between backbones (e.g., NCBI to WoRMS)

functions.name: find_taxonomy_conflicts
functions.description: Detect higher-rank inconsistencies in taxonomy tables
